FaqSection.subtitle: We clarify it all, no jargon
FaqSection.heading:
WE ANSWER YOUR
QUESTIONS, SIMPLY
FaqSection.description: Before working together, it's normal to have questions. Here are the answers to the most common ones — and if you have more, get in touch :)

faq1.q: Why choose an e-commerce agency like Tapilla?
faq1.a: We combine 25 years of tech expertise with deep retail culture. From strategy to post-launch optimisation, our full-stack team delivers measurable growth — not just pretty pages.

faq2.q: What is your technical expertise on Shopify and Shopify Plus?
faq2.a: We're certified Shopify Plus Partners. Our developers build custom themes, headless storefronts, complex checkout flows, and third-party integrations that scale with your business.

faq3.q: How does your CRO and Data agency optimise my sales?
faq3.a: We run continuous A/B tests, heatmap analyses, and funnel audits. Every recommendation is backed by data — so changes drive real revenue, not guesswork.

faq4.q: How do you activate customer loyalty via CRM and Klaviyo?
faq4.a: We design automated email and SMS flows — from welcome series to win-back campaigns — using Klaviyo's segmentation engine to deliver the right message at the right moment.

faq5.q: Does Tapilla build institutional websites on Webflow or WordPress?
faq5.a: Yes. For brands that need a corporate or editorial site alongside their store, we build on Webflow or WordPress with the same attention to design, performance, and SEO.

AgencyPage.subtitle: The Agency
AgencyPage.heading: PASSIONATE ABOUT BRANDS AND DIGITAL TRANSFORMATION
AgencyPage.description: At Tapilla, we believe above all in encounters and ideas that come to life through people. For over 20 years, we have been accompanying brands on their digital adventure, combining creativity, expertise and attention to detail. Each project is a shared story, built on trust, passion and the desire to always go further.

Mission.subtitle: Our Mission
Mission.heading: CREATING VALUE IN EVERY DIGITAL PROJECT
Mission.description: At Tapilla, our mission is to transform our clients' ambitions into lasting digital successes. We combine expertise, creativity and innovation to imagine high-performance e-commerce solutions, designed for today and ready for tomorrow. Driven by people, excellence and integrity, we design projects that engage, inspire and create real value.

Differences.label: Our differences
Differences.heading: A SOLID EXPERIENCE, NOURISHED BY A CONSTANT CURIOSITY
Differences.description: Growing from 30 to over 130 collaborators while keeping our lively and bold spirit — that's the challenge we meet every day. At Tapilla, we believe in evolving, never ceasing to question ourselves. Our capacity to innovate, learn and progress is an integral part of our DNA — and it's what makes us proud, as much as our achievements.

approach.title: Our approach
approach.subtitle: Combining performance and creativity
approach.description: At Tapilla, we believe that digital success is born from the balance between technical rigor and creative freedom. Every project is conceived as a unique collaboration, guided by high standards and attention to detail. We don't just create websites — we build platforms that bring brands to life and turn visitors into loyal customers. Our mission: to combine strategy, design and technology to create high-performing, sustainable and inspiring solutions.

history.title: Our history
history.subtitle: An expertise built on trust and time
history.description: For over twenty years, we have been shaping digital projects with the same demand: that of work well done. Over the years, we have built precise methods, solid processes and a culture of detail that secure every stage of the projects we support. This experience, forged over time, allows us today to approach our clients' challenges with serenity, precision and vision.

team.title: Our team
team.subtitle: A collective adventure above all
team.description: Behind each project, there are passionate women and men, driven by a shared desire: to help brands grow with meaning and creativity. Our richness is the diversity of our talents — developers, designers, strategists, marketers — who unite their know-how to build strong and lasting projects. At Tapilla, collaboration isn't just a buzzword — it's our way of thinking, creating and moving forward together.

onTime.title: On Time
onTime.subtitle: We respect your time and your required deadlines. Our process is built to deliver on schedule. We plan ahead, communicate proactively and track each milestone, so you know what's happening and when.

onBudget.title: On Budget
onBudget.subtitle: We don't believe in surprises and unexpected costs. We ensure that the scope of work is clearly and carefully defined, communicated and approved upfront before work begins. We're transparent and stick to the budget throughout the entire engagement.

proactive.title: Proactive
proactive.subtitle: Whether we have completed a task or modified a timeline, our team keeps you constantly updated at every point within your project or engagement to ensure you are always aware of the status.

conversionFocused.title: Conversion-Focused
conversionFocused.subtitle: We're a conversion-focused agency. Every decision we make is influenced by what we can do to maximize your conversion rate and use Shopify and BigCommerce to its full potential.

bespoke.title: Bespoke
bespoke.subtitle: We build fully custom solutions tailored to your brand and customer that are strategically defined to meet your requirements, solve your pain-points and maximize your growth.

specialized.title: Specialized
specialized.subtitle: We're a specialized, in-house, senior-level team that is trained and certified on the platforms and technologies we are partnered with. Each team member is skilled and experienced in eCommerce strategy, design, development and optimization.

transparent.title: Transparent
transparent.subtitle: You'll always know the status of your project or engagement and the dependencies, assumptions and risks they bring. From project milestones and financials to deliverables and timelines, we provide full transparency into every aspect.

partnerPreferred.title: Partner Preferred
partnerPreferred.subtitle: Our success is tied to yours. We invest in long-term partnerships with our clients, providing ongoing support, optimization, and strategic insights well beyond the build.

We imagine, design and develop tailor-made digital ecosystems — from e-commerce sites to marketing strategy, through design and content management. Our mission: create online experiences that reflect your world, serve your ambitions and sustainably support your growth.

We consider user experience as a strategic investment. A fluid UX transforms a simple visit into a business opportunity: a validated purchase or a submitted contact form.

approach.subtitle: Speed & Core Web Vitals
approach.description: Speed is essential for UX, conversion, and SEO. Our UI designers collaborate with developers to optimize assets, reduce DOM, and adhere to Google performance indicators for a fluid user experience.

history.title: Accessibility
history.subtitle: Inclusion & Digital Accessibility
history.description: Ethical and inclusive design is at the heart of our approach. Digital accessibility standards are constantly evolving, and we integrate best practices from conception: sufficient color contrasts, readable typography, keyboard navigation, and semantic markup for screen readers—all while maintaining aesthetics.

FaqSection.subtitle: Everything you need to know
FaqSection.heading: UNDERSTANDING OUR DESIGN APPROACH FOR E-COMMERCE AND CORPORATE
FaqSection.description: Before collaborating, it's normal to have questions. Here are the answers to the most frequent ones — and if you have others, contact us:

faq1.q: Why invest in UX/UI design for an e-commerce site?
faq1.a: UX/UI design directly impacts conversion rates. A well-designed interface reduces friction, builds trust, and guides visitors toward purchase. Studies show that every $1 invested in UX returns $100 in ROI. For e-commerce, this means more sales, fewer abandoned carts, and higher customer lifetime value.

faq2.q: What is the difference between UX and UI design?
faq2.a: UX (User Experience) focuses on the overall journey and how users interact with your site—information architecture, user flows, and ease of use. UI (User Interface) is about the visual elements—colors, typography, buttons, and overall aesthetics. Both work together: UX ensures the site functions well, UI ensures it looks appealing and reflects your brand.

faq3.q: How do you approach mobile-first design?
faq3.a: We design for mobile first because that's where most users start. This means creating interfaces optimized for touch, smaller screens, and thumb-friendly navigation. We then scale up for desktop, ensuring a seamless experience across all devices. Mobile-first also improves SEO, as Google prioritizes mobile-friendly sites.

faq4.q: Do you work with existing brands or only new projects?
faq4.a: We work with both. For existing brands, we conduct UX audits to identify pain points and opportunities for improvement. We can redesign specific sections, optimize conversion funnels, or completely overhaul your digital presence. Our goal is to enhance your brand while respecting its heritage and business objectives.

faq5.q: How do you measure the success of a UX/UI project?
faq5.a: We define KPIs upfront: conversion rates, bounce rates, time on page, task completion rates, and user satisfaction scores. We use tools like Hotjar, Google Analytics, and user testing to gather data. Post-launch, we monitor performance and iterate based on real user behavior to continuously improve the experience.

faq6.q: What is your process for UX/UI design projects?
faq6.a: Our process typically includes: 1) Discovery—researching your users, competitors, and business goals; 2) Information Architecture—structuring content and user flows; 3) Wireframing—creating low-fidelity layouts; 4) UI Design—applying visual design and branding; 5) Prototyping—building interactive mockups; 6) Testing—validating with real users; 7) Handoff—delivering assets to developers.

CTABanner.heading:
READY TO TRANSFORM
YOUR USERS'
EXPERIENCE?
CTABanner.description: Do you want to offer your users an exceptional visual and interactive experience while boosting your conversions? Contact us today to discuss your needs in DA, UI, UX, webdesign and CRO. Our creative team is ready to propel your website to success.

ExpertiseSection.heading: THE TAPILLA EXPERTISE: DESIGN & CONVERSION FOR E-COMMERCE & INSTITUTIONAL WEBSITES
ExpertiseSection.col1: A website's performance isn't measured solely by immediate revenue, but by its ability to transform an anonymous visitor into a qualified lead or loyal customer. As a full-service digital agency, Tapilla applies a rigorous UX/UI methodology to all types of projects: e-commerce platforms (Shopify, WooCommerce, PrestaShop), showcase sites (WordPress, Webflow), or custom B2B portals. Our belief is simple: a presentation site must be as performant as an online store. If e-commerce targets the cart, the corporate site targets the lead (form, call, download). In both cases, UX must eliminate friction and guide the user toward the defined objective.
ExpertiseSection.col2: Our art direction (AD) is dedicated to enhancing your brand image while reinforcing your credibility. For a service company or industrial player, UX design helps simplify complex offerings, structure the argument, and reassure the decision-maker. We integrate « Mobile First » codes because decision-making, even in B2B, often starts on a smartphone. Our designers work in synergy with SEO experts to ensure that information architecture favors positioning on search engines, guaranteeing visibility and qualified traffic.
ExpertiseSection.col3: Beyond the visual aspect, we work in depth on Tone of Voice and content strategy. A strong brand expresses itself with clarity and carries intelligible values. Our sharp knowledge of platforms (Shopify, PrestaShop) allows us to anticipate implementation challenges from the creation stage to guarantee web performance (Core Web Vitals). Once the Brand Spirit is completed, we activate acquisition levers (SEO, SEA, Social Ads) that capitalize on this new identity. Branding then becomes a real asset serving your ROI.

GenerativeAIPage.description: Stop talking about "image generation", talk about global studio production. We combine artistic direction and multi-AI power to create homogeneous visuals that can be used on all your supports.

FaqSection.subtitle: We clarify everything, without jargon
FaqSection.heading: FREQUENTLY ASKED QUESTIONS ABOUT AI PRODUCTION
FaqSection.description: Before collaborating, it's normal to have questions. Here are the most frequently asked answers — and if you have more, contact us:)

faq1.q: What is the difference between your AI images and image banks (Stock)?
faq1.a: The image bank is generic and used by everyone. Our production is exclusive. We create a graphic style that belongs only to you, homogeneous on your institutional site as well as on your product sheets.

faq2.q: Do you manage media other than the web (Print, POS)?
faq2.a: Yes. Thanks to our Upscaling processes, we generate high definition files that can be used for paper printing (catalogs, posters, POS) without losing quality, guaranteeing perfect consistency with your digital media.

faq3.a: Yes. We work with secure environments and we give you full use of the final images delivered. Unlike public platforms, our 'Agency' workflows guarantee the confidentiality and uniqueness of assets.

faq4.q: Do you integrate visuals on CMS such as Webflow or WordPress?
faq4.a: Exactly. Our technical teams can directly integrate optimized assets (WebP, AVIF) into your environments Webflow, WordPress or Shopify, while respecting web performance best practices.

faq5.a: No, it increases it. At Tapilla, artistic directors and photographers drive the AI. The human eye is essential for framing, emotion, and the final validation of realism. It's a collaboration, not a substitution.

faq6.q: Do you also make videos and social media clips?
faq6.a: Yes, we produce short video clips to boost your newsletters and social networks (Reels, TikTok). These animated formats capture attention much better than a static image.

CTABanner.heading:
INTERESTED IN
CREATIVE INFINITY
AI?
CTABanner.description: Bring your boldest ideas to life. Generative AI does not replace creativity, it offers it new horizons. At Tapilla, we master the latest tools (Midjourney, DALL-E, Stable Diffusion) to produce unique, impactful visuals that are perfectly aligned with your brand identity.

ExpertiseSection.heading: AI EXPERTISE: FROM THE CORPORATE SITE TO THE 360 CAMPAIGN
ExpertiseSection.col1: Generative artificial intelligence is not limited to the production of e-commerce product sheets. At Tapilla, we use it as a powerful creative lever to build corporate visual identities strong and singular. No more uniformity in the image banks viewed and reviewed. We create tailor-made visuals for your showcase sites (Webflow, WordPress), integrating graphic effects, abstract textures or hyper-realistic settings that accurately reflect the values of your company. This visual homogeneity reinforces your credibility and the attachment to your brand. Our approach is resolutely Omnichannel. We know that an image doesn't just live on a computer screen. Our workflows integrate advanced upscaling processes to exploit AI creations on media Print (catalogs, displays, POS) with irreproachable quality. Likewise, we offer these worlds for your emailing campaigns (Newsletters) and your publications on social networks, guaranteeing total consistency regardless of the point of contact with your audience.
ExpertiseSection.col2: The studio is also exploring the viral potential of Video capsules. Thanks to video generation technologies (Text-to-Video, Image-to-Video), we animate your products or brand concepts to create short and impactful formats, perfectly adapted to mobile uses (Reels, TikTok, Stories). These dynamic contents make it possible to capture attention in a saturated social flow, while maintaining the artistic direction defined for your static media. Technical integration is at the heart of our pragmatic method. That your ecosystem is based on a lightweight CMS like Webflow or WordPress, or on robust e-commerce solutions, we deliver assets optimized for the web (weight, format, SEO). We don't just deliver images; we support you in their strategic deployment to maximize the user experience (UX) and natural referencing.
ExpertiseSection.col3: This production flexibility allows unprecedented reactivity. A new commercial offer? A newsletter to be sent urgently? In a few hours, we can generate contextual visuals (seasonality, events) that integrate perfectly into your existing charter. This agility frees your marketing teams from traditional logistical constraints and allows you to quickly test new creative ideas (visual A/B testing). Finally, we ensure constant technological monitoring throughout the graphics chain. By choosing Tapilla, you have access to an innovation laboratory that masters both photorealistic rendering for retail and stylized illustration for corporate purposes. We transform the complexity of AI tools into a creative resource that is accessible, secure and directly actionable for your global communication.

card1.title: Visual identity & ambiance
card1.description: Beyond the product, we create complete graphic worlds. Material effects, light effects or abstract environments for your showcase and corporate sites.

card2.description: Inclusive ready-to-wear campaigns. Change the model or the decor to adapt your speech to each audience.

FaqSection.subtitle: Learn more about Tapilla & Shopify
FaqSection.heading: Why choose Tapilla as a Shopify Plus agency?
FaqSection.description: Find answers to the most common questions about our Shopify expertise, migration process, and e-commerce services.

faq1.q: Why should I consider redesigning my e-commerce site under Shopify?
faq1.a:
Shopify offers many advantages for online retailers: an intuitive interface, optimal technical performance, enhanced security, and scalability to manage both small shops and large sales volumes.

As a Shopify Plus agency, we have found that sites migrated to Shopify generally benefit from a significant improvement in the conversion rate and a reduction in maintenance costs. Our methodical approach guarantees you a transition without business interruption and a redesign that respects your brand's DNA while optimizing the customer experience.

faq2.q: What is the Shopify Plus label and why is it important?
faq2.a: Shopify Plus is the enterprise-level platform for high-volume merchants. As certified Shopify Plus Partners, we have demonstrated deep expertise, extensive experience and the ability to deliver Shopify projects of the highest quality. By choosing a Shopify Plus Partner agency, you ensure that you are working with experts certified by Shopify themselves.

faq3.q: How does a site redesign under Shopify actually take place?
faq3.a:
The redesign process generally consists of 6 steps:

• Audit your current site and definition of objectives
• Conception of the new architecture and design
• Shopify store development
• Data migration (products, customers, orders)
• Extensive testing and optimizations
• Launch and post-launch support

We support you every step of the way with a proven process.

faq4.q: Will I lose my SEO by migrating to Shopify?
faq4.a:
No, as long as the migration is properly planned and executed. Our SEO expertise on Shopify allows us to set up an effective redirection strategy (301) and to optimize the new site for SEO.

We've even seen that most of our customers see their positioning improve after the migration, thanks to the superior technical performance of Shopify.

faq5.q: Can Shopify manage large product catalogs?
faq5.a: Absolutely. Shopify is perfectly capable of managing catalogs of several thousand products. Our "Shopify Partner Premier" status gives us access to advanced resources and techniques to optimize performance even with very large catalogs. In particular, we have carried out successful migrations for customers with more than 50,000 references.

faq6.q: Is it possible to integrate my ERP/CRM/management software with Shopify?
faq6.a: Yes, Shopify has a very rich ecosystem of integrations. Whether you use SAP, Salesforce, HubSpot, or any other management software, connectors generally exist. We've also developed our own integration solutions for less common systems. Our technical team has deep expertise in API development and can create custom connectors to sync your data between Shopify and your existing management tools. These integrations ensure the automation of your processes and eliminate double entries, allowing you to effectively manage your omnichannel business.

faq7.q: Can I customize my Shopify site for my specific needs?
faq7.a: Absolutely. Contrary to some preconceived ideas, Shopify allows a high level of personalization. Our "Shopify Premier" status testifies to our ability to create unique and tailor-made e-commerce experiences, while maintaining the performance and security advantages of the platform.

faq8.q: What are the business sectors where Tapilla particularly excels?
faq8.a: We offer several post-launch support packages, including technical maintenance, continuous optimizations, user support and strategic support. Our flexible support contracts guarantee fast response times (under 4 hours for emergencies) and privileged access to our team of experts. Our proactive support includes regular performance audits, security updates, and optimization recommendations based on the analysis of your data. We also provide you with a dedicated customer portal to follow up on your requests and access exclusive resources.

faq9.q: Do you offer e-commerce growth services beyond development?
faq9.a:
Absolutely. Our approach goes well beyond simple technical creation. We offer comprehensive e-commerce support services including:

• Data-based CRO (Conversion Rate Optimization) optimization
• Digital marketing strategy adapted to your sector
• Marketing automation and personalized customer journeys
• Advanced analytics and custom dashboards
• Technical SEO specific to Shopify
• Omnichannel strategy advice and marketplace integration

Our "Shopify Premier" status gives us access to exclusive resources and information to maximize your growth.

faq10.q: What post-launch support do you offer?
faq10.a: We offer several post-launch support packages, including technical maintenance, continuous optimizations, user support and strategic support. Our flexible support contracts guarantee fast response times (under 4 hours for emergencies) and privileged access to our team of experts.

ExpertiseSection.heading: SHOPIFY PLUS AGENCY: TECHNICAL ARCHITECTURE & E-COMMERCE PERFORMANCE
ExpertiseSection.col1: Delivering code is not enough. As a Shopify Plus Partner agency, Tapilla merges technical engineering and business strategy. We build robust e-commerce architectures, calibrated to absorb your peak loads, eliminate technical debt, and support your frictionless scale-up. ERP (SI) System Integration & Synchronization The reliability of your e-commerce depends on the backend. We are developing custom connectors (Private apps or Middleware) to streamline your operations. We ensure the connection ERP & CRM with solutions like Sage, Cegid, Netsuite or Salesforce. Integration PIM (Akeneo or Quable) makes it possible to centralize data, while the automation of logistics (WMS) optimizes your shipping flows. Migrating to Shopify Plus: Securing SEO Re-platforming from Magento or PrestaShop is a surgical operation. Our experts guarantee the maintenance of your Google history.
ExpertiseSection.col2: We conduct a Data audit to clean the databases, establish a 301 Redirect Plan comprehensive to avoid 404 errors, and ensure a Monitoring accurate via the analysis of server logs and the Search Console. Shopify Plus is no longer just B2C. We are deploying the native suite Shopify B2B to unify your sales channels. This includes the management of personalized catalogs and rates (Tiered pricing), specific payment terms (net terms, credit limits) as well as Company Profiles and the management of buyer permissions. Custom Development & Checkout We use 100% of the capabilities of the Plus license to adapt the platform to your business rules. We use the Checkout Extensibility for your upsells and complex rules, Shopify Functions for custom backend logics, and can offer an approach Headless (Hydrogen) for ultra-specific UX.
ExpertiseSection.col3: Web Performance & Core Web Vitals Speed is a direct factor in conversion and SEO ranking. We don't just do "beautiful" things, we do things fast. We are developing Liquid 2.0 themes lightweight, let's finely optimize the Core Web Vitals (LCP and CLS) and let's design a UX Mobile First priority. Internationalization: Shopify Markets Pro Sell internationally without multiplying administrative complexity via Shopify Markets. Take advantage of the Multi-currency and multi-language native, of the automated management of Taxes and Customs Duties, and of the deployment of Expansion stores dedicated to your key markets.

BrandComparison.label: E-commerce excellence
BrandComparison.heading: NO MORE DATA SILOS. MAKE WAY FOR UNIFICATION.
BrandComparison.headerParagraph: The growth of your e-commerce is often held back by invisible technical debt: disconnected ERP, poor PIM and unconverted UX.

section1.description: Seamless connections with Sage, Cegid, Netsuite. Your stocks and orders synchronized in real time.

BentoGrid.heading: OUR HYBRID APPROACH
BentoGrid.description: We are merging software engineering and performance marketing.

card1.title: Shopify Redesign & Migration
card1.description: Secure transition from Magento, PrestaShop, or WooCommerce to Shopify Plus. Retention of SEO, migration of customer data and redesign of UX to maximize the conversion rate.

card2.title: CRO & Data UX

card4.title: Global Acquisition Strategy
card4.description:
Technical SEO, Google Ads, Social Ads and Emailing (Klaviyo). A unified vision to reduce your CAC and increase LTV.

Semantic Audit/Max Performance Campaigns

WordPressPage.subtitle: WordPress development
WordPressPage.heading:
WORDPRESS AGENCY:
YOUR SITE DESIGNED
TO LAST AND GROW
WITH YOU
WordPressPage.description: +15 years of technical expertise. We combine the power of the most used CMS in the world with the Tapilla requirement to create secure, eco-designed and 100% manageable sites.

BrandsSection.subtitle: The observation
BrandsSection.heading: ARE YOU WORRIED ABOUT THE "GAS FACTORY" EFFECT?
BrandsSection.description: We are fighting the stereotypes of "DIY" WordPress that businesses rightly fear.

card1.title: Degraded performance
card1.description: Your current site is slow, burdened by dozens of useless extensions and unoptimized code that penalizes your SEO and the user experience.

card2.title: Critical safety
card2.description: Scared of hacks or updates that "break" the design? A poorly maintained WordPress is an open door to vulnerabilities.

card3.title: Complex back office
card3.description: The back office is illegible and you don't dare touch anything anymore. You are losing your autonomy on a tool that is supposed to make your life easier.

NumberedCardsGrid.subtitle: The Tapilla method
NumberedCardsGrid.heading: GLOBAL SUPPORT FROM A TO Z

card1.title: Strategy & Eco-design
card1.description: A successful site is played before the first line of code. We define a structure aligned with your business goals by prioritizing the essentials and digital sobriety.

card2.title: UI/UX & Identity
card2.description: Emotion at the service of conversion. Our art directors design unique interfaces (UIs) and smooth user journeys (UX).

card3.title: Development & Integration
card3.description: We create a custom section library for clean, lightweight code and simple administration. We prefer Gutenberg, but we control the entire ecosystem (ACF, React, Elementor) to adapt to your constraints.

card4.title: Sustainability & Serenity
card4.description: We guarantee a complete service: high availability hosting, security maintenance and dedicated support to ensure the evolution of your platform.

CTABanner.heading:
READY TO TRANSFORM YOUR
DIGITAL PRESENCE?
CTABanner.description: Whether for a redesign, a migration or a tailor-made creation, benefit from the support of a global agency.

TimelineSection.heading:
WHY WORDPRESS
IS THE UNAVOIDABLE CHOICE
TimelineSection.description: The combination of Open Source and Tapilla technical rigor.

freedom.title: Freedom & Open Source
freedom.description: You are 100% owner of your site and your data. Unlike SaaS, you don't rent the core of the technology.

selection.title: The Tapilla selection
selection.description: To avoid incompatibilities, we use a limited catalog of proven modules. We only recommend stable solutions to ensure safety.

connectivity.title: Connectivity (API)
connectivity.description: WordPress integrates perfectly with your information system. Via its native API, we connect your site to your business tools (CRM, ERP, HR, PIM).

seo.title: SEO, RGPD & Accessibility
seo.description: An irreproachable technical structure: optimization for natural referencing (SEO), strict compliance with the RGPD and compliance with accessibility standards.

FaqSection.subtitle: Candid answers to your technical questions
FaqSection.heading: FREQUENTLY ASKED QUESTIONS ABOUT WORDPRESS DEVELOPMENT
FaqSection.description: Before collaborating, it's normal to have questions. Here are the most frequently asked answers — and if you have more, contact us.

faq1.q: Will my site be secure against hacks?
faq1.a: Yes. Safety is our priority. We don't install superfluous plugins that create flaws. We set up a robust server architecture, regular backups and ensure preventive maintenance.

faq2.a: Eco-design is at the heart of our approach. By using the native Gutenberg editor and avoiding unnecessary code overload, we produce lightweight sites that consume fewer server resources.

faq3.a: At 100%. Unlike rental platforms (SaaS), with WordPress at Tapilla, the code and the database belong entirely to you. You are free to change the host.

faq4.a: No. We set up the interface to be simple. We train you in delivery so that you are autonomous in content management. For technology, our maintenance takes care of everything.

faq5.q: I already have a WordPress site, can you take it back?
faq5.a: Yes, we first carry out a technical and security audit of the existing system. If the code meets the standards, we can provide maintenance (TMA) or carry out a gradual redesign.

ExpertiseSection.heading: WORDPRESS AGENCY: CUSTOM TECHNICAL EXPERTISE & SUSTAINABLE PERFORMANCE
ExpertiseSection.col1: As global digital agency, Tapilla is positioned as the preferred partner for SMEs and major accounts for the design of platforms Custom WordPress. Our rigorous technical approach moves away from standard installations to favor efficient native development. Web performance (Core Web Vitals) andeco-design are not options but prerequisites. By limiting technical debt and removing unnecessary dependencies, we ensure optimal load times. GDPR compliance is built in by design.
ExpertiseSection.col2: The security of your data is ensured by a high availability hosting architecture and preventive maintenance protocols. Using Tapilla means choosing the robustness of web engineering that has been tested for 15 years. Administration often relies on Gutenberg or ACF Pro for total flexibility. Unlike "page builders" who add weight to the code, our custom blocks respect W3C standards and accessibility standards (RGAA).
ExpertiseSection.col3: Beyond WordPress development, our strategy department supports you on the dimension Globale : traffic acquisition, data and functional evolution. Whether for a corporate site or a B2B platform, the Tapilla solution meets scalability requirements. Opt for an open-source, sovereign and 100% proprietary solution, maintained by a team of experts dedicated to your long-term digital growth.

BrandingPage.subtitle: Expertise Branding
BrandingPage.heading:
PRINT DRIVEN
BY DATA.
BrandingPage.description: Extend your digital strategy to paper effortlessly. Use the power of your structured product data (PIM, ERP, Shopify) to generate your catalogues automatically.

WhyBranding.label: What we create
WhyBranding.heading:
BRANDING, OBJECTIVES
AND ROI.
WhyBranding.description: Why invest in a strong brand identity?

approach.title: Image & Values
approach.subtitle: Define identity
approach.description: A stronger image with your clients, in perfect alignment with your company values.

history.title: Differentiation
history.subtitle: Deploy the image
history.description: A unique and differentiating brand universe, for better recognition and memorisation of your brand.

team.title: Preference & ROI
team.subtitle: Activate growth
team.description: Create brand preference to convert better! A strong design is a direct growth lever.

BentoGrid.heading: TOTAL COHERENCE
BentoGrid.description: Your brand image doesn't stop at a logo. We design a complete visual ecosystem that performs across all touchpoints.

card1.title: Visual Identity & Web Design
card1.description: Creation of responsive logos, typographic choices, and color palettes designed for screens and accessibility.

card2.title: Tone of Voice
card2.description: Defining your editorial line to speak correctly to your audience. Copywriting, storytelling, micro-copy.

card3.title: Social Media & Ads
card3.description: Adaptation of your brand guidelines for Instagram, LinkedIn, and Google Ads.

card4.title: E-commerce Integration
card4.description: We don't just create images. We are technical experts. Your branding is designed to integrate natively on Shopify, PrestaShop, Webflow, WordPress, or your ERP tools.

ExpertiseSection.heading: BRANDING EXPERTISE & GLOBAL DIGITAL STRATEGY
ExpertiseSection.col1: In a saturated digital ecosystem, brand identity goes far beyond a simple logo or graphic charter. At Tapilla, we approach the global digital strategy through the lens of Brand Sprint. Our methodology fuses the imperatives of emotional marketing with the constraints of today's web. Whether you are a pure e-commerce player or an industry in full digital transformation, your image must be a vector of immediate trust and support your conversion objectives.
ExpertiseSection.col2: We design responsive visual identities, conceived as 'mobile-first', capable of adapting as seamlessly in a Shopify header as in a dynamic Social Ads campaign. This rigor in artistic direction ensures that every touchpoint reinforces your positioning and memorability in the market. At the heart of our expertise lies the creation of evolving Design Systems. Rather than freezing your brand, we create libraries of living components — facilitating the work of your marketing teams and your developers.
ExpertiseSection.col3: Beyond the visual aspect, we work in depth on the Tone of Voice and brand content strategy. A strong brand expresses itself with clarity and carries intelligible values. Our in-depth knowledge of platforms (Shopify, PrestaShop) allows us to anticipate implementation challenges from the start to guarantee web performance (Core Web Vitals). Once the Brand Sprint is complete, we activate growth levers (SEO, Social Ads) that capitalise on this new identity. Branding then becomes a true asset in the service of your ROI.

FaqSection.subtitle: Everything you need to know
FaqSection.heading:
FREQUENTLY ASKED
QUESTIONS
FaqSection.description: Any remaining doubts about the Brand Sprint? Find all the answers here to start your project with confidence.

faq1.q: What exactly is a Brand Sprint?
faq1.a: It is a methodology inspired by Google Ventures' Design Sprints. Instead of spreading brand creation over months, we concentrate decision-making and creation into a short period (a few days to a few weeks) to obtain a concrete, actionable, and immediately testable result.

faq2.q: What is the difference from a traditional branding agency?
faq2.a: The traditional approach often delivers heavy theoretical documents. Tapilla is a hybrid technical and creative agency: our branding is designed for the web, code, and conversion. We don't just deliver a PDF, but assets ready to be integrated into your e-commerce site or social networks.

faq3.q: What do you receive at the end of the sprint?
faq3.a: You receive a complete Brand Book (Logos, palettes, typography, usage rules), social media adaptations, UI mockups for your website (Homepage, typical product page), and a Tone of Voice guide.

faq4.q: Is it suitable for a redesign?
faq4.a: Absolutely. It's even the ideal use case. If your current brand is aging poorly or no longer converting, the Brand Sprint allows you to modernize the image while preserving the historical DNA of the company, without paralyzing your activity for months.

faq5.q: Do you integrate the brand on Shopify or WordPress?
faq5.a: Yes. Tapilla has dedicated technical teams. Once the Brand Sprint is validated, our front-end developers can implement your new identity on Shopify, WordPress, Webflow, PrestaShop, or via custom development, ensuring technical performance.

faq6.a: Our Brand Sprint offers are fixed-price to avoid unpleasant surprises. The budget varies depending on the depth of the deliverables (identity alone vs identity + complete web adaptations). Contact us for a precise estimate adapted to your needs.

BrandComparison.label: Brand strategy
BrandComparison.heading: A NEW WAY TO BUILD YOUR BRAND

obsolete.title: The Obsolete Legacy
obsolete.subtitle: THE OLD METHOD NO LONGER WORKS
obsolete.description: Building a brand platform used to take months, resulting in 100-page PDF documents that were disconnected from the reality of websites or ad campaigns. Slow, costly, and not agile.
obsolete.point1: Production times too long (3 to 6 months)
obsolete.point2: Visual identity unsuited for mobile & web

tapilla.subtitle: THE BRAND SPRINT
tapilla.description: An intensive and collaborative method where targeted workshops align strategic vision with immediate graphic execution, ready for web integration.

ExpertisesSection.title: Three expertises, one single ambition: yours

AutomationPage.subtitle: Automation & Visual Development
AutomationPage.heading:
ARCHITECTS OF YOUR FLOWS:
N8N, SHOPIFY FLOW & AI
AutomationPage.description: Tapilla merges the agility of No-Code and the power of development. We orchestrate your processes with the best tools (n8n, Shopify Flow, Make) and accelerate development thanks to AI (Claude Code).

ExpertiseSection.heading: AUTOMATION & VISUAL DEVELOPMENT AGENCY: OPERATIONAL EXCELLENCE
ExpertiseSection.col1: The era of monolithic code is over. Today, successful businesses are adopting Visual Development and intelligent automation. Tapilla is positioned as your strategic partner in navigating this complex ecosystem. We're not just integrators; we're flow architects. Our expertise extends to mainstream No-Code platforms such as Zapier and Make (ex-Integromat) up to native solutions like Shopify Flow and to powerful middleware like N8n. Our agnostic approach allows us to select the tool perfectly suited to each need.
ExpertiseSection.col2: Why pay for external automation when Shopify Flow can manage the tagging of your VIP customers or fraud detection for free? To synchronize thousands of product references between a Sage ERP and Shopify Plus, the power of n8n hosted is indispensable. We complement this expertise with generative AI (Claude Code) to develop tailor-made logic building blocks. This "Hybrid" methodology offers the best of both worlds: the free performance of Shopify Flow, the agility of Make for marketing, and the robustness of n8n for critical data.
ExpertiseSection.col3: As a technical agency, we apply web development standards to automation: versioning, recipe environments, error monitoring and documentation. Whether you are looking to automate your marketing, optimize your logistics or streamline your customer service, the Tapilla Automation team designs interconnected ecosystems. We free your teams from repetitive tasks so they can focus on their core business. Discover the power of visual development — connect n8n, Shopify Flow, Make, and your APIs with Tapilla expertise.

FaqSection.subtitle: We clarify everything, without jargon
FaqSection.heading:
AUTOMATION QUESTIONS
& VISUAL DEV
FaqSection.description: Before working together, it's normal to have questions. Here are the answers to the most common ones — and if you have more, get in touch.

faq1.q: Should you choose n8n, Make, or Shopify Flow?
faq1.a: Each tool has its territory. Shopify Flow is unbeatable for actions internal to Shopify (customer tagging, order cancellation, fraud) because it is native, free and immediate. Make is great for marketing (connecting Facebook Leads to Slack). n8n is required for heavy operations, file processing and connection to ERPs, where Flow and Make show their technical or pricing limitations.

faq2.q: What is Claude Code's role in your services?
faq2.a: Claude Code is an advanced AI tool that our developers use to speed up the writing of scripts (Python, JS) within your n8n or Flow automations. Where a standard connector shows its limits, we use Claude to generate robust and tailor-made code.

faq3.q: Is low-code reliable for a large company?
faq3.a: Yes, if the architecture is mastered. "Visual Development" allows for easier maintenance than a "black box" of pure code. However, Tapilla adds a layer of rigor (error management, logs, tests) to ensure that your Make or n8n workflows are as stable as a traditional application.

faq4.q: How do you ensure data sovereignty?
faq4.a: For critical data, we prefer n8n in self-hosted on French servers. Unlike 100% American SaaS solutions (Zapier/Make), this ensures that your customer data does not leave your controlled infrastructure. Shopify Flow remains secure within the Shopify environment.

faq5.a: Absolutely. We often audit Make or Zapier accounts that have become "gas factories". We streamline them, optimize costs, and often migrate expensive logic from Zapier to Shopify Flow (free) or n8n (flat rate).

faq6.q: What is the budget for an automation strategy?
faq6.a: The hybrid approach allows you to adjust the budget. There's no licensing cost to use Shopify Flow. A simple Zapier workflow can cost little. A complete n8n architecture interconnecting ERP and e-Commerce represents a more substantial technical project. The advantage is the immediate ROI.

CTABanner.heading:
AUTOMATE
YOUR GROWTH
CTABanner.description: Free audit of your technical stack. Let's identify the automation levers together (n8n, Flow, Make).

BentoGrid.heading:
VISUAL DEVELOPMENT
& AUTOMATION
BentoGrid.description: 360° expertise to streamline each layer of your business.

card1.title: Orchestration Middleware (N8N)
card1.description:
The core of the reactor. We deploy dedicated n8n instances to manage your heavy synchronizations (Inventory, Orders, PIM). It is the robust bridge between your E-commerce and your ERP, designed to handle massive volumes.

ETL SQL/Postgres Webhooks

card2.title: Native & Rapid (Flow/Make)
card2.description: We operate Shopify Flow at 100% for internal logic (tagging, risks) in order to avoid external costs, and Make for fast marketing connectivity.

card3.title: AI Coding (Claude Code)
card3.description: Our developers use Claude Code to generate custom Python/JS scripts, pushing the limits of standard nodes.

card4.title: Audit & Data Architecture
card4.description: Before automating, you need to simplify. We analyze your Stack (legacy and modern) to define where to place the cursor: should you use Shopify Flow for free? switch to n8n? or a simple Zap?

RightTool.heading: THE RIGHT TOOL FOR THE RIGHT USE
RightTool.description: Don't lock yourself into a single technological dogma. At Tapilla, we believe in the hybrid approach. We mix the robustness of the code, the nativity of Shopify Flow and the agility of Make.
RightTool.monolithicDescription: Code everything by hand or use expensive Shopify apps for each microfeature.
RightTool.tapillaDescription: Intelligent orchestration between n8n, Shopify Flow, and Make to maximize ROI.
RightTool.imageAlt: Automation orchestration diagram showing connected nodes

PrivacyPolicy.metaDescription: Read Tapilla's privacy policy to understand how we collect, use, and protect your personal data.
PrivacyPolicy.label: Legal
PrivacyPolicy.heading:
Privacy
Policy
PrivacyPolicy.s1Body:
This Privacy Policy defines the procedure for processing and protecting personal data of individuals using the services of Tapilla SAS (hereinafter referred to as 'the Operator').

This Policy is developed in accordance with Federal Law No. 152-FZ 'On Personal Data' dated 27.07.2006 (as amended), as well as the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) for users from the European Union.

Tapilla SAS is a web and e-commerce agency with registered offices in Paris and Lyon, France.
PrivacyPolicy.s2Body:
The Operator processes personal data for the following specific purposes:

• Processing inquiries and applications submitted through the contact form
• Communication regarding projects and services
• Concluding and executing contracts
• Sending newsletters (with separate consent)
• Complying with legal obligations
• Improving website functionality and user experience

Processing is carried out only for the purposes specified at the time of data collection.
PrivacyPolicy.s3Body:
We process the following categories of personal data:

• Identification data: full name, job title
• Contact data: email address, phone number
• Communication data: messages, project details, inquiries
• Technical data: IP address, browser information, cookies, visit history

We do not process special categories of personal data (biometric, health, etc.) unless explicitly required by law.
PrivacyPolicy.s4Body:
Processing of personal data is carried out on the following legal bases:

• Consent of the data subject — for newsletter subscriptions, marketing communications, and non-essential cookies
• Contractual necessity — for fulfilling contracts and pre-contractual obligations
• Legitimate interest — for fraud prevention, security, and improving services
• Legal obligation — when required by applicable laws

Consent is obtained as a separate document and can be withdrawn at any time by contacting hello@tapilla.com.
PrivacyPolicy.s5Body:
Personal data is processed using automation tools and/or without using such tools.

Storage periods:
• Contact form data: 3 years from last interaction
• Contract data: duration of contract + 5 years (legal requirement)
• Cookie data: up to 13 months from last visit
• Analytics data: 26 months

Data is destroyed or anonymized upon expiration of storage periods or upon withdrawal of consent, unless otherwise required by law.
PrivacyPolicy.s6Body:
You have the following rights regarding your personal data:

• Right to access — obtain confirmation of processing and a copy of your data
• Right to rectification — correct inaccurate or incomplete data
• Right to erasure ('right to be forgotten') — delete data when no longer necessary
• Right to restriction — limit processing in specific circumstances
• Right to data portability — receive data in a structured format
• Right to object — object to processing based on legitimate interest
• Right to withdraw consent — at any time without affecting prior lawful processing

To exercise these rights, contact us at hello@tapilla.com.
PrivacyPolicy.s7Title: Transfer of personal data to third parties
PrivacyPolicy.s7Body:
We may transfer personal data to third parties in the following cases:

• Service providers: EmailJS (email delivery), Vercel (hosting)
• Legal authorities: when required by applicable laws or court orders
• Successor entities: in case of merger, acquisition, or asset sale

All third parties are bound by confidentiality obligations and data protection requirements. We do not sell or rent personal data to third parties for marketing purposes.
PrivacyPolicy.s8Body:
Personal data may be transferred to and processed in countries outside your country of residence, including the United States (hosting services).

We ensure appropriate safeguards for such transfers:
• Standard Contractual Clauses (SCCs) approved by the European Commission
• Adequacy decisions for countries recognized as providing adequate protection
• Technical security measures (encryption during transmission)

For Russian data subjects: we minimize cross-border transfers and process data primarily within the EEA when possible.
PrivacyPolicy.s9Body:
We implement comprehensive technical and organizational measures to protect personal data:

• Technical measures: TLS/SSL encryption, secure hosting, access controls, regular security audits
• Organizational measures: staff training, confidentiality agreements, limited access on need-to-know basis
• Incident response: procedures for detecting, reporting, and investigating data breaches

In case of a data breach, we will notify affected users and competent authorities as required by law within 72 hours.
PrivacyPolicy.s10Body:
Our website uses cookies and similar technologies:

• Essential cookies: necessary for website functionality (session management, security)
• Analytics cookies: Google Analytics 4 with IP anonymization to understand website usage
• Preference cookies: remember your settings and choices

You can manage cookie preferences through the banner displayed on your first visit or via browser settings. Non-essential cookies require your consent before activation.
PrivacyPolicy.s11Body:
To exercise your rights regarding personal data:

1. Send a request to hello@tapilla.com with subject line 'Data Subject Request'
2. Include your full name and contact information for verification
3. Specify which right you are exercising and provide details
4. We will respond within 30 days (may be extended to 60 days for complex requests)

There is no fee for exercising your rights unless requests are manifestly unfounded or excessive.
PrivacyPolicy.s12Body:
You may withdraw your consent to personal data processing at any time:

• For newsletter subscriptions: click 'Unsubscribe' in any email or email hello@tapilla.com
• For cookie consent: clear browser cookies or adjust browser settings
• For general consent: email hello@tapilla.com with subject 'Withdraw Consent'

Withdrawal of consent does not affect the lawfulness of processing based on consent before its withdrawal. We will stop processing your data for the purposes covered by the withdrawn consent, unless another legal basis applies.
PrivacyPolicy.s13Body:
We may update this Privacy Policy periodically to reflect changes in:

• Legal requirements and regulations
• Our data processing practices
• Services and features offered

The current version is always available at tapilla.com/privacy-policy. We will notify users of significant changes via email or website notice. The date of the last update is indicated at the top of this policy.
PrivacyPolicy.s14Body:
For any questions regarding this Privacy Policy or personal data processing:

Tapilla SAS
Email: hello@tapilla.com
Address: 1 Rue de Rivoli, 75001 Paris, France

For Russian data subjects: You may also contact the Federal Service for Supervision of Communications, Information Technology and Mass Media (Roskomnadzor) regarding compliance with Russian personal data legislation.
PrivacyPolicy.s15Body:
The Operator is responsible for compliance with personal data protection legislation.

Applicable law:
• For EU residents: General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR)
• For Russian residents: Federal Law No. 152-FZ 'On Personal Data'
• For other jurisdictions: applicable local data protection laws

The Operator's liability is limited to cases of willful misconduct or gross negligence. Users are responsible for providing accurate and up-to-date information.
PrivacyPolicy.s16Body:
This Privacy Policy comes into force on May 17, 2025 and applies to all personal data processing activities carried out by Tapilla SAS from that date forward.

This Policy replaces all previous versions of the Privacy Policy. By using our website and services after this date, you acknowledge and agree to this Privacy Policy.

LegalNotice.metaDescription: Legal notice and mandatory publication information for Tapilla, a French web and e-commerce agency.

Notice

This website is published by:

Tapilla SAS

However, Tapilla SAS cannot guarantee the completeness, accuracy, or timeliness of information and accepts no liability for any errors, omissions, or results obtained from using this information.

Links to third-party websites are provided for convenience only. Tapilla SAS has no control over the content of those sites and accepts no responsibility for them.
LegalNotice.s5Body: This website and its content are governed by French law. Any dispute arising from the use of this website shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of Paris, France, unless mandatory consumer protection rules in your country of residence provide otherwise.

tab0.label: E-commerce agency
tab0.title: We are an e-commerce agency!
tab0.p1: We work on the creation of eCommerce sites on Shopify, Prestashop as well as on the deployment of comprehensive marketing strategies.
tab0.p2: Our global approach allows us to support numerous customers in all sectors of activity, from design to operational management, with particular attention to continuous optimization. Trust an agency that has been able to evolve with digital and retail, and that continues to innovate to ensure your online success.
tab0.p3: Whether you are in the thinking phase, in the midst of developing your online store, or looking for post-launch optimization, we adapt our expertise to your specific needs.
tab0.p4: We were born before the Internet and will be there to support you after the Internet! 🙂

tab1.label: Creative agency
tab1.title: We are a creative, branding, UX and UI agency
tab1.p1: As a creative agency, we focus on Branding, the UX and UI to shape unique and compelling experiences. Our goal is to create strong identities and intuitive interfaces that put the user at the heart of each project.
tab1.p2: Performance and creativity are the drivers that guide us to offer you innovative and effective solutions. We work with Figma for a smooth and fast collaboration with our customers, from prototyping to final design.
tab1.p3: Thanks to our expertise in Brand Sprint, we quickly build solid brand strategies. Finally, we develop powerful brand territories that reinforce your company's identity and resonate with your audience.

tab2.label: Web agency
tab2.title: We are a web, tech and nocode agency
tab2.p1: Our expertise in CMS allows us to master low-code solutions as well as Webflow than open-source CMS like WordPress, offering efficiency for any web project.
tab2.p2: We integrate a creative approach into each project, with an emphasis on adapted web design, strategic branding, and optimal user experience (UX) and user interface (UI).
tab2.p3: These combined skills allow us to transform and align each site with your unique brand identity, while maximizing engagement and return on investment. They say that creativity is the form that brings the bottom up 🙂

tab3.label: Marketing agency
tab3.title: We are a marketing agency
tab3.p1: We can support you in digital marketing and marketing automation, working with historical partners such as Klaviyo, Nosto, Gorgias, Yotpo,... to provide you with extension solutions.
tab3.p2: With more than 100 solutions that can be integrated via their applications, our expertise also extends to no-code development such as Make, as well as to more specific development with Symfony.
tab3.p3: This diversity of skills allows us to orchestrate complex and personalized digital marketing campaigns that optimize customer engagement and maximize business results. For us, a project that finishes is a project that starts with our RUN & Marketing team 🙂

CookieBanner.title: Cookie Consent
CookieBanner.description: We use cookies to enhance your browsing experience, serve personalized content, and analyze our traffic. By clicking 'Accept All', you consent to our use of cookies in accordance with our Privacy Policy.
CookieBanner.preferencesDescription: Customize your cookie preferences below. Necessary cookies are always enabled as they are essential for the website to function.
CookieBanner.necessaryDescription: Essential cookies required for the website to function properly. These cannot be disabled.
CookieBanner.analyticsDescription: Cookies that help us understand how visitors interact with our website by collecting anonymous data.
CookieBanner.marketingDescription: Cookies used to deliver personalized advertisements and track their effectiveness.
